title: ComfyUI Tutorial Series Ep Nunchaku: Speed Up Flux Dev & Kontext with This Trick
description:
In this episode of the ComfyUI tutorial series, you'll learn how to dramatically boost your image generation speed using Nunchaku with Flux Dev and Flux Kontext. This method brings real-time generation down to just 7 seconds on compatible RTX GPUs.

We'll walk through a full installation process using a simplified installer (thanks to Ivo), which sets up a portable version of ComfyUI with all necessary nodes, Python, Git, and dependencies, without affecting your existing installation. You’ll also learn how to reuse models from your current setup to save space and time.

⚠️ System requirements:
- Windows OS
- NVIDIA RTX GPU

What you'll learn:
- How to install the Nunchaku-compatible version of ComfyUI
- How to load and optimize Flux and Flux Kontext models
- How to convert existing workflows to use Nunchaku
- How to fix common GPU compatibility errors
- How to use prebuilt workflows for generation, image editing, and product mockups
- How to integrate Loras from CivitAI for style trans
